# slurm_qos (Resource)

Manages a Slurm Quality of Service (QOS) definition.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "slurm_qos" "standard" {
  name        = "standard"
  description = "Standard priority QOS"
  priority    = 100
  max_wall_pj = 1440
}

resource "slurm_qos" "priority" {
  name        = "priority"
  description = "High priority QOS with preemption"
  priority    = 200
  max_wall_pj = 2880

  preempt_list = [slurm_qos.standard.name]
  preempt_mode = ["CANCEL"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the QOS.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the QOS.
- `flags` (List of String) QOS flags.
- `max_wall_pj` (Number) Maximum wall clock time per job in minutes.
- `preempt_list` (List of String) List of QOS names that this QOS can preempt.
- `preempt_mode` (List of String) Preemption mode (e.g. CANCEL, REQUEUE).
- `priority` (Number) The priority value for this QOS.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The QOS name (same as name).
